title: Saathi Ai: AI companion for elderly Indians — Hindi, voice-first | Product Hunt
excerpt: Saathi AI - My mother called me at 11pm last year. Not because something was wrong. Just because she was lonely. She's 68. Lives alone in Lucknow. I'm abroad. She had no one to talk to. That call made me build Saathi AI. WHAT IS SAATHI AI? Saathi AI is India's first voice-first AI companion designed specifically for elderly Indians aged 60-86+. Not a chatbot. Not a health tracker. A genuine daily companion that talks to them in Hindi and English — warmly, patiently, like a family member.

不是因为出了什么问题。

content_html_zh: Saathi AI - 去年晚上 11 点我妈妈给我打电话。 不是因为出了什么问题。 只是因为她很孤独。 她68岁了。 独自住在勒克瑙。 我在国外。 她没有人可以说话。 这个电话让我建立了 Saathi AI。 SAATHI AI 是什么？ Saathi AI 是印度首款语音优先的人工智能伴侣，专为 60-86 岁以上的印度老年人设计。 不是聊天机器人。 不是健康追踪器。 一个真正的日常伴侣，用印地语和英语与他们交谈——热情、耐心，就像家人一样。
